atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left knee pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports occasional left knee pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left knee pain less than once a day

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes a 'giving out' sensation in the left knee

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports needing to hold a grocery cart for support

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain coming and going quickly

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies a specific injury

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies a fall

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies a bump

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes farxiga regularly

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes amlodipine regularly

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes lisinopril regularly

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes hydrochlorothiazide regularly

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's blood pressure remains around 120/70 mmHg

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Vital signs are stable: temperature 98.2°F, pulse 72, respirations 16, blood pressure 120/70 mmHg.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A slight two over six systolic ejection murmur is appreciated at the left base.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals no ecchymosis or edema, no effusion, and no pain to palpation of the left medial knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Range of motion is full.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: No decreased range of motion was noted.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient can bend and straighten his knee as expected.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A quick physical exam was performed, including auscultation of the heart and lungs, which were clear.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's left knee x-ray showed no evidence of fracture or bony abnormality.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's left knee pain is most likely due to osteoarthritis.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes meloxicam 15 mg daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders an echocardiogram.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a hemoglobin A1C.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up appointment in four weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends physical therapy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to consider using a cane if needed when traveling to Columbus, Georgia.
